name: Household invitations
description: Implement household invite flow. Backend: POST /api/v1/households/:id/invitations (admin-only; generates a single-use token with configurable TTL and target role), GET /api/v1/invitations/:token (validate token, return household preview — public, no auth required), POST /api/v1/invitations/:token/accept (authenticated; adds caller as member with designated role, rejects if already a member or token expired/used). Frontend: Invite Members panel (copy-link UI), and an Accept Invite page that handles the token deep-link flow (auth-gated, shows household name and role before confirming). Per docs/product-specs/household-invitation.md.
